description: Built-up areas: trading centres, townships, municipalities, cities
source_name: Traffic (Speed Limits) Rules 1975 (rev 2022) / Traffic Act Cap 403 - Kenya Law
notes: Statutory urban limit. Applies inside boundaries of any trading centre/township/municipality/city. Posted signage overrides where present.
Widely cited statutory/NTSA limit for private cars on dual carriageways. Exact schedule wording should be re-confirmed against the gazetted Schedule.
Statutory/NTSA limit for private cars on single carriageway highways.

source_name: Traffic (Speed Limits) Rules 1975 (rev 2022) Schedule, vehicle classes
notes: Max for PSVs/commercial classes per the Rules Schedule. Specific class caps (e.g. >3.5t) may differ; confirm per vehicle class in the gazetted Schedule.

NTSA-stated 30 km/h for designated school zones, carried by credible media. NOT yet matched to an exact gazetted rule citation here - do not treat as settled statute for a given zone without the posted sign / official notice for that site.
Part of a 2024 proposed speed-limit reform (incl. 70 km/h on undivided rural highways). PROPOSED, not confirmed in force. Included for tracking only; do not display as an active legal limit.
